name: Export MBG to XSF (with Sounder Files)

pages.title: Metadata
pages.description: Define metadata to complete the output XSF

parameters.name: out_dir
parameters.help: Directory in which all output data will be written

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.help: Allow to overwrite file if already exists.

parameters.name: ignoreWC
parameters.help: Ignore water column datagrams and water column specific files.

parameters.name: xsfKeywords
parameters.help: A comma-separated list of key words and/or phrases. For direct sonar-generated files, this should at least include the type of sonar

parameters.name: xsfLicense
parameters.help: Either enter the URL to a standard or specific license, enter Freely distributed or  None , or describe any restrictions to data access and distribution in free text.

parameters.name: xsfRights
parameters.help: Description of the usage rights of data in the file.

parameters.name: xsfSummary
parameters.help: A paragraph describing the dataset, analogous to an abstract for a paper. For direct sonar-generated files, this can be blank.

parameters.name: xsfTitle
parameters.help: A short phrase or sentence describing the dataset. For direct sonar-generated files, this can be as simple as 'Files generated by the XYZ sonar'
